positive: A symmetrical, stylized silhouette design featuring a gentle woodland creature, perhaps a fox or a deer, playfully interacting with blooming flowers and lush foliage. The style should be detailed linework combined with clean, solid color blocking (like a minimalist folk art illustration). Use a rich, autumnal palette: deep burnt orange, forest green, creamy ivory, and accents of sapphire blue. The composition must be highly centered, perfect for chest placement on apparel. Emphasize strong contrast and crisp, graphic edges, ensuring the design translates well when printed on fabric. Vector art quality, flat design, storybook illustration, perfect symmetry, high detail.
negative: blur, photo, realistic, messy, dirty, watermark, text, logo, signature, poor anatomy, artifact, grain, noisy, low contrast, bad composition, out of frame, extra limbs, copyright
